productDisplayName: Franco Leone Men Formal Brown Formal Shoes
description: Cast a timeless impression with this pair of franco leone oxfords. Give your formal wear a twist of style with this leather shoe and revel in the comfort of easy fashion.UpperLeather upper with a matt finish for absolute comfort and styleSuede inner lining for all-day sweat-free comfortLace-up system for a snug, customised FitMildly padded collar for in-step comfortMidsoleCushioned leather footbed for absolute all-day comfortOutsoleTPU outsole with weed-shape grooves on the forefoot, midfoot and front heel, and with horizontal grooves on the toe region and back heel for absolute grip on smooth surfacesRaised heel for ergonomic comfortBrand badge on the midfoot regionshoe careWipe surface with a dry, clean cloth to remove dust and dirtUse a branded leather conditioner to maintain shoe shineDo not store in direct sunlight
